S.text: Established patient, age 34, routine comprehensive exam; no specific complaint. Soft contact lens wearer wishing to renew CL Rx.
Mild end-of-day contact lens dryness, right lens slightly drier than left; long wearing time ~7am to 10-11pm.
Denies flashes and floaters; no medical conditions or medications.

O.text: Pupils equal, round, reactive, no afferent pupillary defect.
Manifest refraction OD -2.00 -0.50 x 175, VA 20/20; OS -2.25 sphere, VA 20/20; stable, essentially unchanged from prior year.
Slit lamp: lids/lashes clean, conjunctiva quiet, no CL-related injection; corneas clear without neovascularization or staining; anterior chambers deep and quiet; crystalline lenses clear OU.
Non-dilated wide-field fundus imaging: optic nerves healthy C/D 0.2 OU; maculae flat and clear; vessels normal; no peripheral concerns.

A.text: Myopia with mild astigmatism OU, stable.
Healthy contact-lens-wearing corneas; ocular health unremarkable OU.

P.text: Maintain current spectacle Rx (stable); continue current contact lens (same base curve and power).
Finalize contact lens Rx after fit check of lenses in situ.
RTC 1 year for next comprehensive; reorder contacts as needed.
